content.speakerText: Do you use Reels? I'm obsessed with the new filters.
content.speakerTextCn: 你用Reels吗？我超爱那些新滤镜。

options.text: I use it for work—it's great for reaching a broad audience.
I hate it because it's too slow to load.
I only use it to check the weather.
I don't have a phone, so I can't use any apps.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了Reels的功能（用于工作和扩大受众），符合对话中‘我用来工作’的语境。干扰项一是关于加载速度（无关），二是关于查天气（完全不相关），三是关于没有手机（与对话前提矛盾）

content.speakerText: Why do you use Threads? Isn't it just Twitter 2.0?

options.text: It's less toxic and better for meaningful conversations.
I use it because it has better video editing tools.
It's the only app that lets me post photos.
I use it to avoid talking to anyone.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了对话中的关键词‘less toxic’和‘meaningful conversations’，符合对比平台的语境。干扰项一是错误地强调视频编辑（非Threads核心），二是说‘唯一发照片的平台’（不真实），三是逻辑矛盾（避免交流≠使用社交平台）

content.speakerText: What do you think about Instagram Stories compared to regular posts?
content.speakerTextCn: 你觉得Instagram Stories和普通帖子相比怎么样？

options.text: I prefer Stories because they're temporary and feel more authentic.
I only use Stories to post my bank statements.
Stories are worse because they cost money to post.
I don't use any social media because I'm allergic to screens.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了‘temporary’和‘authentic’这两个与Stories功能相符的关键词。干扰项一是荒谬的用途（银行对账单），二是错误声称收费（Stories免费），三是完全脱离现实（对屏幕过敏）
